posts.author: ebetancourt (Efrain Betancourt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello

I have a mistery I am unable to resolve. When on my boards when a status change example from Pending to Done - the update section generates a new log however that log is generated showing the name of the owner of the Board not the member that changed the status - anyone know why?

posts.author: hlopezvc (Hernan Lopez)
posts.cookedHtml: hello You are changing status via mobile app?
